content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — SettingsView.swift:11 user-visible caption labels "AI Sort" feature as "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order".
Pierre: Apple reviewers may flag user-facing "Experimental" language as a sign of an unfinished feature, which can trigger 2.2 rejection or questions even though the description/release notes are clean. This string is shown directly in Settings, not a code comment, so it counts as store-facing UI copy. Consider rephrasing to something like "New feature — sort order may change" instead of "Experimental... unstable" to avoid implying the build is a beta/WIP.
